what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-assets channel, linking a channel-memory attachment id to a target image asset URI and recording when it was added.
observations: target points to image://design-assets/Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 12
standouts: Attachment id maps to an external image URI via a custom image:// scheme
conventions: Custom URI scheme for asset target
concerns: No versioning or checksum for referenced image
Target URI contains spaces and may need encoding in consumers
notes: This is a lightweight ledger entry that records a design image attachment reference and its creation time.
questions: Is the target URI resolvable by a specific asset service?
What does Frame 12 represent in the design file?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated as an attachment record and it does exactly that: it links an attachment id to an image asset target and records an addition timestamp.
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped pointer from a channel attachment record to a specific image asset in the design-assets space.
novelty: Use of a custom image:// scheme to reference a design asset by channel and human-readable name within a channel-memory attachment file.
contribution: Provides a stable attachment identifier and target URI pairing that lets a fused system locate and display the referenced design image asset.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file for the design-assets channel that maps attachment id att-6680b87e to the image asset 'Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 12' and records its addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and timestamp an image attachment reference in the design-assets channel.
